Artemis_0448.speaker: Artemis
Artemis_0448.text: Save some for me next time.

Melinoe_2935.speaker: Melinoë
Melinoe_2935.text: One of these nights you ought to ask Headmistress how she got this from the House.

Prometheus_0463.speaker: Prometheus
Prometheus_0463.text: I am surpassed... but never beaten...

Zagreus_0050.speaker: Zagreus
Zagreus_0050.text: What if something happened... something must have happened... but then how am I still dreaming? If this even is a dream. Oh, blast, where is she... when is she...?

Zagreus_0104.speaker: Zagreus
Zagreus_0104.text: Good news! The terms of your Infernal Contract are fulfilled!
